projectSummary: MockChain is a fixture project used to drive the generation pipeline deterministically with no live model calls.

problemAnalysis.coreProblem: Validating a multi-agent pipeline against a live model is slow and costs credits.
problemAnalysis.gap: No first-class deterministic fixture mode that exercises the gate loop and persistence without spend.

competitiveAnalysis.name: Ad-hoc mocks
competitiveAnalysis.differentiationOpportunity: A single fixture set valid against the real parsers.

technicalLandscape.blockchainRationale: No chain is used; this is a testing fixture.
knownRisks: Fixtures drifting from real output shapes
technicalLandscape.architectureNotes: Short-circuit each worker; keep the orchestrator unchanged.

redFlags: Fixtures must stay valid against the renderer
opportunities: Reuse fixtures for CI regression tests

sources.claim: Fixture mode is internal and unsourced by design

notesForWriter: All figures here are illustrative estimates; nothing is a sourced market claim.
